transcript.text:
(Hidden in Mapo-gu,)
(there is a great restaurant) The aura of that restaurant is...
(flowing with intimidating aura?) quite intimidating, if you ask me
(Apparently, only a few locals know of this chicken kalguksu place)
(Thorough investigation) Bon appétit
(Are you sure this is chicken kalguksu...?) I noticed this one is very special
It's my first time seeing chicken kalguksu served like this
(Confirmation of a great restaurant) Oh, it's good
(All hidden eateries have more than one delicious dish...?)
This is top tier among mung bean pancakes
(Top tier?!) Even the North Korean style dumplings are the most delicious
(Now, we reveal the hidden delicious eatery that even a mukbanger didn't know) There's a lot of good eateries that I don't know of
Hello, everyone
Today, I am here
at Seogyo-dong, Mapo-gu
I came here due to work nearby,

and I found a very special-looking chicken kalguksu* place *Handmade chopped noodles
(Quite far away from the main street) Rather than the main street, this is at a very quiet alley
And it's been in business for almost 30 years
So over there,
(Today's eatery "Unification of North and South") the aura of that restaurant is intimidating, if you ask me
Their chicken kalguksu is famous, but it specializes in North Korean style dumplings
I heard their dumpling stew is famous as well, so let's check it out
I have entered the restaurant
And it feels quite old
The exterior looks quite old as well...
And the floor is linoleum flooring!
(Today's menu) Rice cake dumpling soup, kal-dumpling soup, steamed dumplings, boiled chicken soup
There's Dongdongju*?! *Rice wine
(Gimme alcohol) Wow, that's awesome
(Today's order) Excuse me...
I'd like one rice cake dumpling soup, one chicken kalguksu, one beef bone kalguksu,

one steamed dumpling, one mung bean pancake,
(She couldn't resist drinking...) and one Dongdongju, please
(Here comes today's clean feast)
(The End Boss of crunchiness, mung bean pancakes)
(North Korean style dumplings known for their light cleanness)
(Simple is key, rice cake dumpling soup & beef bone kalguksu)
(Even the special chicken kalguksu, the reason for visiting!)
(The dishes are here) It's so massive
Thank you
- This is the rice cake dumpling soup - Okay
Thank you
- Is this the beef bone kalguksu? - Yes
(One Dongdongju is this big...?!) It's so big
This is chicken kalguksu,
and this is beef bone kalguksu
This is rice cake dumpling soup

And this is mung bean pancake
Is this dumpling? Steamed dumpling
(If she drinks this all, we might not be able to film...) There's so much Dongdongju, I got so surprised
This is 8,000 won
(Drunk warning) I might get drunk
Bon appétit!
I noticed this is very unique
It's my first time seeing chicken kalguksu served like this
(Not the basic white soup we know, it's very red...!) The chicken has this red color
Let's mix this up nicely
It's a red-colored kalguksu
Lemme taste the soup first
(Has a kick...!) It feels like spicy meat stew
Oh, it's good
The noodles are chewy
It has a very deep beef bone base

and you know that red oil that spicy meat stews have?
There's a bunch of that, so it's spicy and deep at the same time
I like it!
And this is the regular
beef bone kalguksu
This tastes completely different
This is genuine beef bone soup
Wow, this is...
a legit beef bone soup which you can add rice after eating noodles
Normally, the soup for kalguksu
is similar to that of anchovy kalguksu, right?
(This kind of kalguksu is a first...) The soup is completely beef bone soup, just completely
I bet the dumpling soup is beef bone soup too
As expected
The beef bone soup is great
(To that, you cannot leave out alcohol) I'll get a glass of Dongdongju!

I bet this goes well with it too
With...this pancake,
I mean, this mung bean pancake...
(It'll go well together...)
(Cider which goes well with Dongdongju) Thank you
Oh, the smell!
It's good...!!
(Preventing hangovers)
Even lightweights can enjoy this, I bet!
I like to drink, but I'm not good with fermented ones
I'm very weak to wine or makgeolli
(Already drunk) I feel tipsy already LOL
Dumplings! Dumplings!
(A white color) As you can see, this is totally a North Korean style dumpling!
The inside is so full!
I thought...

it won't be that full inside
When you look at it from the outside!
But the inside is really full!
Oh, it's great!
The filling is like a North Korean style dumpling...
(But it's seasoned in a South Korean way...?) But the seasoning is not like that
One thing that disappointed me about North Korean style dumplings
(A bland dumpling that gets split opinions...!) was that it was seasoned too mildly...which is a charm itself
But I like my food salty, so it disappointed me
It feels like I'm eating soft tofu that is melting,
so it's exactly like a North Korean style dumpling,
(Feels like they added more flavor...!) but it's softer than other ones and strongly seasoned
It's definitely not mild
Other North Korean style dumplings are bland
It's good!
(Time to taste the mung bean pancake she had high hopes for!)

(Crunch!)
Awesome
Wow
(What is this...?)
(Another "Wow" which isn't the norm...!)
Of the mung bean pancakes I've eaten,
this is top tier
It's so crunchy
even on the inside
Only the middle is slightly soft
and it's just really good, seriously
(Acknowledged)
As you can see...
(The prime example of crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside) There are ingredients like this inside
It's very crunchy and very good
Can you....see how crunchy it is?

(The sound is insane...!)
Oh, the Dongdongju!!
(Dongdongju is a must for mung bean pancakes...!)
Before the kalguksu gets soggy!
I...
didn't know this place that well
(The restaurant is already full and noisy) but there are no empty seats
The dumpling...
Of the North Korean style dumplings I had so far,
(Even the North Korean style dumplings are top tier...?!) these are the most delicious
I think it's because they're strongly seasoned
Look at the inside!
(The North Korean style dumpling is so full inside) It doesn't look like it's that full from the outside,
but once you take a bite,
you can obviously tell it's full
I've found a great eatery

Honestly speaking, I feel bad saying this,
but from the outside, it didn't look that appetizing...
(But now, there's a special place in my heart...)
Kinda like...
"Huh...?"
"HUUUH?!" is what it feels like
Wow, they gave me so much Dongdongju!
The Dongdongju is great as well
(Acknowledged as a great eatery) It's a great eatery
(Cutting it into bite-sized pieces...)
(Mung bean escapes) Ahh, no!
(Mung bean pancake, I can't lose you...) Thankfully, it fell on the table
They fried it well too,
but the inside is very delicious
It's seasoned to perfection as well
(Last but not least, it's time for the dumpling soup....)

(Sprinkle sprinkle)
Ah-choo!
(An unintended pepper attack...)
(This time, sprinkling with less force...)
Let's mix it up!
I don't like
I don't like food that has gone cold,
but for rice cake soups, even cold ones are so good
(Since it's cold, there's so much rice cake too LOL) 5 rice cakes are stuck together LOL That's so good!
Now...
(Mom, I guess I'm an adult now too...) I think my tastebuds have matured as well
It's very good
(At an age to find dishes that weren't that good to be very good) A long time ago, I didn't eat mung bean pancakes and North Korean style dumplings that much
As I film mukbangs,
there are moments of small happiness
(A small happiness in finding an unexpected good restaurant) If I come with no expectations and it's really good, it makes me so happy

Good eatery!
(Hehe, it's good)
(I don't reach for it since the food is so good...) The Dongdongju is starting to get forgotten
You'll leave the alcohol...
Yeah, I guess so!
(Dongdongju thief) It's mine then
Takeout LOL
Last dumpling!
One dumpling is quite big!
Wow, I love it!
(Complete)
Wow, I enjoyed it so much
The alcohol...!
Well, it's mine...
(Great to come during the day or night) Whether it's lunch or dinner
It's a very good, hidden eatery to eat with Dongdongju

(I recommend the cleanliness!) Those who like mild food like North Korean style ones would like this
Anyway, I had another great meal today
